title: hearth.voice.intent v1
description: Voice intent classification event from Hearth's wake-word → classify → dispatch pipeline. Published after classification so Android Jarvis screen can show real-time feedback that a command was heard and classified. Low-frequency, high-value signal for mobile.

session_id.description: Unique session identifier for the voice command context

raw_text.description: The raw transcribed text from the voice input

intent_class.description: The classified intent category (e.g. device_command, media_command, hardware_query, general, unknown)

model_used.description: The model that performed the classification (e.g. ollama/mistral-nemo, minimax/m2-7b)

dispatch_target.description: The target service or handler the intent was dispatched to

latency_ms.description: End-to-end latency from wake-word detection to dispatch decision in milliseconds
